name: Gloreos
recipeIngredient: 1 18 ounces Pk Devils food cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cookie ingredients and spread in a cookie sheet.
2. Bake at 350°F for about 15 minutes (check to ensure it is not burning). You can use a round cookie cutter or glass to cut the cookies and then spread with filling that has been mixed together.
